exercises.notes: **NEW exercise** — lat isolation, no biceps engagement
Bodyweight only, clean across all 3 sets
**First direct lateral delt work logged in Phase 1**
**+5 kg vs 4/28 PR** (20 kg × 10/10/10). Set 2 dipped, set 3 recovered

session_notes:
Fasted 6am training. Eating window opens at noon.
**Shoulder gap addressed.** First Phase 1 session with both shoulder press AND direct lateral delt isolation in one workout. The 4/22 push day had ZERO shoulder work — this directly compensates. PT may have heard the flag.
**Two PRs today:** DB shoulder press (5→10 kg, 100% jump from baseline) and barbell curl (20→25 kg, +25%). Both on a "deload" week pattern — mixed signal vs 4/30 leg compound deload.
**Biceps curl set 2 dipped to 8 reps**, set 3 recovered to 10. Suggests 25 kg is at the top of clean range — earn 3×10 clean before pushing to 27.5 kg.
**Two new exercises logged:** dual-rope straight-arm pulldown (lat isolation, no elbow flexion — biceps-free pulling) and seated DB lateral raise (lateral delt isolation). Both useful for Phase 2 carry-over.
Per [[project_pt_programming_style|PT programming pattern]]: heavy compound first, then accessories. Curl came AFTER lateral raise + shoulder press — biceps were less pre-fatigued than typical pull days. Likely why the curl PR landed.
**Still no face pulls / rear delt work** — fourth session running (4/21, 4/22, 4/28, 5/1). Front delts + lateral delts hit today, but rear delts skipped again. Carry into Phase 2 programming.
